texto: In the beginning said a Persian poet - Allah took a rose a lily a dove a serpent a little honey a Dead Sea apple and a handful of clay. When he looked at the amalgram - it was a woman.
explicacao: Citação de William Sharp sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “In the beginning said a Persian poet - Allah took a rose a lily a dove a serpent a little honey a…” articula reflexao, women, beginning em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
